name: Agent Librairy
description: Specialized Python agents that execute each step of app generation and validation.

name: Code Library
description: Reusable Python and Swift blocks, with local interfaces for testing them.

name: iOS Ready
description: Production-ready iOS models and their registry files for direct integration.

name: Knowledge Librairy
description: Domain knowledge that grounds agents and models in trusted rules and guidelines.

name: MCP Library
description: Shared MCP servers and tools that autonomous agents can call safely.

name: Model Library
description: Portable, self-contained vision models designed for testing and MCP integration.

name: Skills
description: Reusable cross-app capabilities that agents use to complete focused tasks.
